output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?homeTeam ?homeTeamLabel WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P179 wd:Q16151453 ; wdt:P1545 "3" ; wdt:P1314 ?score ; wdt:P1416 ?homeTeam .
  ?homeTeam rdfs:label ?homeTeamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?homeTeamLabel) = "ga")
  FILTER(STRBEFORE(STR(?score) , '-') = STRAFTER(STR(?score) , '-'))
}
LIMIT 1

- series ordinal (wd:P1545 as wdt), also known as "index", "num.", "number", "ordinal", "ordinal number", etc.:

- part of the series (wd:P179 as wdt), also known as "collection", "episode of", "in series", "issue of", "listed in", etc.:
  - series which contains the subject

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?homeTeam ?homeTeamLabel WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P179 wd:Q16151453 ; wdt:P1545 "3" ; wdt:P1314 ?score ; wdt:P1416 ?homeTeam .
  ?homeTeam rdfs:label ?homeTeamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?homeTeamLabel) = "ga")
  FILTER(STRBEFORE(STR(?score) , '-') = STRAFTER(STR(?score) , '-'))
}
LIMIT 1
```
